items.title: The Australian Dollar bides its time between Beijing and Washington
items.summary: The Australian Dollar has spent the past two weeks doing very little, and that stillness is the whole story.

items.title: Chinese Yuan: Consolidates against US Dollar – UOB
items.summary: UOB’s Quek Ser Leang notes USD/CNH slipped to 6.7865 before rebounding, with oversold conditions suggesting limited further downside and an intraday 6.7860–6.7990 range.
items.title_ko: 중국 위안화: 미국 달러 대비 통합 – UOB
items.summary_ko: UOB의 Quek Ser Leang은 USD/CNH가 반등하기 전에 6.7865로 미끄러졌으며, 초과 판매 조건으로 인해 추가적인 하방이 제한되고 일중 6.7860-6.7990 범위가 있음을 시사합니다.
